changelog: Continue Watching: Fixed orphan blank "SERIES" cards. WatchProgressStore now (1) refuses to save a progress entry with a blank title at all, (2) filters blank-title entries out of the Continue Watching list, and (3) hard-prunes them on the next read. Existing blank cards on your device will disappear automatically the next time you open Home — no Clear All needed.

Side-rail focus: Reverted to the v1.44.42 baseline (no focus modifiers on the rail Column) — the v1.44.43 + v1.44.44 attempts caused IllegalStateException crashes on Nvidia Shield's Compose focus engine.
Carried over from v1.44.42: Are-you-done prompt (Dialog-wrapped, D-pad navigation works), Clear All, tombstone deletion, 14-day auto-prune, auto-focus first CW tile.
